summary: Prepared plan artifact for coding task
explanation: Generated by the local deterministic fallback because the remote planner was unavailable. Task: Implement Lucky5 Phase 3.4 from external PR notes and custom patch format. Constraints: repo is on main with unrelated local modifications already present; avoid disturbing those changes; analyze patch applicability/conflicts; likely use isolated git workflow; update targeted files for backend GameService, frontend game.js, and regression tests; verify with dotnet build and custom test runner; run Azure what-if or dry-run validation for current infra; only if all checks pass, commit with PR-notes-referenced message, merge into main, and push.

recommended_actions.label: Review the assembled context pack before making edits
recommended_actions.reason: This keeps the main execution agent aligned with the available evidence.
